title: SG13 8PX, Warrendale Pullets 2023 Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/FP3039WU/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Warrendale Pullets 2023 Limited Installation name: Bucks Farm Poultry Unit Permit number: EPR/FP3039WU/S003  "
